mapper.select: SELECT food_id AS foodId, name, calorie, carb, protein, fat, sodium, sugar, source, food_type AS foodType FROM food WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY name LIMIT 50

SELECT food_id AS foodId, name, calorie, carb, protein, fat, sodium, sugar, source, food_type AS foodType FROM food WHERE calorie IS NOT NULL AND calorie <= 200 AND (fat IS NULL OR fat <= 5) AND (protein IS NULL OR protein >= 5) -- 타입 필터 (진짜 식사/반찬 느낌 나는 것들) AND ( food_type IS NULL OR food_type IN ('MEAL','FOOD_DB','PRODUCT_DB','UNKNOWN') ) -- 보충제/젤리/스낵류 제거 AND name NOT LIKE '%젤리%' AND name NOT LIKE '%콜라겐%' AND name NOT LIKE '%영양제%' AND name NOT LIKE '%보충제%' AND name NOT LIKE '%구미%' AND name NOT LIKE '%스틱%' AND name NOT LIKE '%타블렛%' AND name NOT LIKE '%캡슐%' ORDER BY calorie ASC, protein DESC LIMIT 30

SELECT food_id AS foodId, name, calorie, carb, protein, fat, sodium, sugar, source, food_type AS foodType FROM food WHERE calorie IS NOT NULL AND calorie BETWEEN 80 AND 450 AND protein IS NOT NULL AND protein >= 8 AND (fat IS NULL OR fat <= 15) AND ( food_type IS NULL OR food_type IN ('MEAL','FOOD_DB','PRODUCT_DB','UNKNOWN') ) -- 새우/대게 등은 서비스단에서도 한 번 더 중복 제거 -- 보충제/간식류 이름 필터 AND name NOT LIKE '%젤리%' AND name NOT LIKE '%콜라겐%' AND name NOT LIKE '%영양제%' AND name NOT LIKE '%보충제%' AND name NOT LIKE '%구미%' AND name NOT LIKE '%스틱%' AND name NOT LIKE '%타블렛%' AND name NOT LIKE '%캡슐%' AND name NOT LIKE '%바%' AND name NOT LIKE '%쿠키%' AND name NOT LIKE '%과자%' AND name NOT LIKE '%스낵%' AND name NOT LIKE '%케이크%' AND name NOT LIKE '%호빵%' AND name NOT LIKE '%교자%' AND name NOT LIKE '%만두%' AND name NOT LIKE '%도넛%' AND name NOT LIKE '%와플%' AND name NOT LIKE '%파이%' AND name NOT LIKE '%베이글%' ORDER BY calorie ASC, protein DESC LIMIT 30

SELECT food_id AS foodId, name, calorie, carb, protein, fat, sodium, sugar, source, food_type AS foodType FROM food WHERE protein IS NOT NULL AND protein >= 10 AND ( food_type IS NULL OR food_type IN ('MEAL','FOOD_DB','PRODUCT_DB','UNKNOWN') ) AND name NOT LIKE '%젤리%' AND name NOT LIKE '%콜라겐%' AND name NOT LIKE '%영양제%' AND name NOT LIKE '%보충제%' AND name NOT LIKE '%구미%' AND name NOT LIKE '%스틱%' AND name NOT LIKE '%타블렛%' AND name NOT LIKE '%캡슐%' ORDER BY protein DESC, calorie ASC LIMIT 30

SELECT food_id AS foodId, name, calorie, carb, protein, fat, sodium, sugar, source, food_type AS foodType FROM food WHERE carb IS NOT NULL AND carb <= 20 AND (calorie IS NULL OR calorie <= 500) AND (fat IS NULL OR fat <= 20) AND ( food_type IS NULL OR food_type IN ('MEAL','FOOD_DB','PRODUCT_DB','UNKNOWN') ) AND name NOT LIKE '%젤리%' AND name NOT LIKE '%콜라겐%' AND name NOT LIKE '%영양제%' AND name NOT LIKE '%보충제%' AND name NOT LIKE '%구미%' AND name NOT LIKE '%스틱%' AND name NOT LIKE '%타블렛%' AND name NOT LIKE '%캡슐%' AND name NOT LIKE '%바%' AND name NOT LIKE '%쿠키%' AND name NOT LIKE '%과자%' AND name NOT LIKE '%스낵%' ORDER BY carb ASC, calorie ASC LIMIT 30

SELECT food_id AS foodId, name, calorie, carb, protein, fat, sodium, sugar, source, food_type AS foodType FROM food WHERE fat IS NOT NULL AND fat <= 5 AND calorie IS NOT NULL AND calorie BETWEEN 50 AND 500 AND ( food_type IS NULL OR food_type IN ('MEAL','FOOD_DB','PRODUCT_DB','UNKNOWN') ) AND name NOT LIKE '%젤리%' AND name NOT LIKE '%콜라겐%' AND name NOT LIKE '%영양제%' AND name NOT LIKE '%보충제%' AND name NOT LIKE '%구미%' AND name NOT LIKE '%스틱%' AND name NOT LIKE '%타블렛%' AND name NOT LIKE '%캡슐%' AND name NOT LIKE '%바%' AND name NOT LIKE '%쿠키%' AND name NOT LIKE '%과자%' AND name NOT LIKE '%스낵%' ORDER BY fat ASC, calorie ASC LIMIT 30

SELECT food_id AS foodId, name, calorie, carb, protein, fat, sodium, sugar, source, food_type AS foodType FROM food WHERE calorie IS NOT NULL AND calorie BETWEEN 80 AND 450 AND protein IS NOT NULL AND protein >= 8 AND (fat IS NULL OR fat <= 15) AND ( food_type IS NULL OR food_type IN ('MEAL','FOOD_DB','PRODUCT_DB','UNKNOWN') ) AND name NOT LIKE '%젤리%' AND name NOT LIKE '%콜라겐%' AND name NOT LIKE '%영양제%' AND name NOT LIKE '%보충제%' AND name NOT LIKE '%구미%' AND name NOT LIKE '%스틱%' AND name NOT LIKE '%타블렛%' AND name NOT LIKE '%캡슐%' AND name NOT LIKE '%바%' AND name NOT LIKE '%쿠키%' AND name NOT LIKE '%과자%' AND name NOT LIKE '%스낵%' AND name NOT LIKE '%케이크%' AND name NOT LIKE '%호빵%' AND name NOT LIKE '%교자%' AND name NOT LIKE '%만두%' AND name NOT LIKE '%도넛%' AND name NOT LIKE '%와플%' AND name NOT LIKE '%파이%' AND name NOT LIKE '%베이글%' ORDER BY calorie ASC, protein DESC LIMIT 30

SELECT f.food_id AS foodId, f.name, f.calorie, f.carb, f.protein, f.fat, f.sodium, f.sugar, f.source, f.food_type AS foodType FROM diet_item di JOIN diet_log dl ON di.diet_id = dl.diet_id LEFT JOIN food f ON di.food_id = f.food_id WHERE dl.user_id = #{userId} AND dl.log_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND di.calorie >= #{minCalorie} AND f.food_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY di.calorie DESC LIMIT 30

SELECT food_id AS foodId, name, calorie, carb, protein, fat, sodium, sugar, source, food_type AS foodType FROM food
calorie <= #{maxCalorie}
AND name NOT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND food_type = 'DRINK'
AND ( food_type IS NULL OR food_type NOT IN ('DRINK','SUPP') )
ORDER BY calorie ASC LIMIT 20
